THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DRYBAY, INC. DRYBAY CLEANERS, INC. HAN, STEVEN J. YIM, KELLY $23,176.36 PRINCIPAL, $2,650.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $400.05 INTEREST, $498.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,724.41, IT IS FURTHER ORDER AND ADJUDGED THAT THE PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST, IS THE OWNER OF THE FOLLOWING LEASED EQUIPMENT: ONE NEW ITSUMI DOUBLE SLEEVE/DS-201A(SERIAL# 050533); ONE NEW REMA VAC RP-8 1/12 HP STAINLESS STEEL TANK 115/203 I PHASE ( SERIAL # 04043), WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $10, 000.00 AND IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER SAID PROPERTY FROM DEFENDANTS. IN THE EVENT PLAINTIFF, BANK OF WEST, OBTAINS POSSESSION OF AND SELLS SAID PERSONAL PROPERTY HEREAFTER, DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE ALL CREDITS TO WHICH THEY ARE ENTITLED BY LAW. SEE SCAN DOC.
